info.name: HMS — Room, Facilities, Inventory, Guest, F&B & Reports
info.description:
## Credentials (after **01 — Setup → Initialize**)

| User | Username | Password (default from Initialize body) | Use for |
|------|----------|------------------------------------------|---------|
| **Super admin** | `admin` | `ChangeMe!Strong1` | **All** `/api/v1/platform/**` routes and **03 — Platform Admin** (including **08 Create hotel**). Run **02 — Auth** → **01 Login super admin (admin)**. |
| **Hotel admin** | `hoteladmin` | `ChangeMe!Strong2` | Tenant APIs under `/api/v1/hotels/{{hotelId}}/**`. Run **02 — Auth** → **02 Login hotel admin (hoteladmin)**. |

**Create extra hotel (optional):** `POST {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/platform/hotels` — request **08 Create hotel**. The new hotel id is saved as **`extraHotelId`** only — **`hotelId` stays the Initialize hotel** so `hoteladmin` + `X-Hotel-ID` keep working.

---

## If you see **403 Forbidden** (hotel APIs)

1. **Wrong JWT for folder:** **04–12** need **02 → 02 Login hotel admin**. **03** needs **02 → 01 Login super admin**. Using super-admin token on hotel routes can fail method security; using `hoteladmin` on `/platform/**` fails.
2. **`X-Hotel-ID` must equal** the UUID in the URL and **must match the hotel in the JWT** for `hoteladmin`. If **`hotelId` was overwritten** (old collections did this), re-run **01 Initialize** or set **`hotelId`** to the same id as in the admin user’s hotel (from DB or setup response).
3. **`X-Impersonate-Token`:** leave **disabled/removed** unless you use **03 → 04 Impersonate** with a real JWT. A placeholder or empty value is ignored and does not clear Bearer auth.
4. Do **not** reuse **03 → 03 Onboard tenant** for **`hoteladmin`** unless you log in as that tenant’s admin user; onboarded id is stored in **`onboardedTenantHotelId`**.

---

## Run order (folders **01 → 02 → 03 → 04 → …**)

**01 — Setup** → **01 Initialize** (once). Saves **hotelId**.

**02 — Auth** → **01 Login super admin** before **03 — Platform Admin**. → **02 Login hotel admin** before **04–12** (hotel APIs). Optional **03 Refresh** (`POST /auth/refresh`) after any login.

**03 — Platform Admin** (super admin) → optional **03 Onboard tenant** / **08 Create hotel** (see **`onboardedTenantHotelId`**, **`extraHotelId`** — **`hotelId` unchanged**).

**04 — Room types** → **05 — Rooms** → **06 — Reservations** → **07 — Housekeeping** → **08 — Guests** → **09 — Facilities** → **10 — Inventory** → **11 — F&B** → **12 — Reports**.

---

### Environment

- **baseUrl** — e.g. `http://localhost:8080`.
- **setupToken** — must match `hms.setup.token`.
- **token** — from Login scripts; strip newlines on UUID vars (collection pre-request).

### Module notes

- **Post room charge** after **Check-in**; **roomId** in path must match reservation.
- **Create reservation** saves **guestId**.
- **Facilities / Inventory / F&B** — see folder descriptions.
- **v2.3-aligned responses:** See **docs/BACKEND_CHECKLIST_ALIGNED.md** in the repo. Room list **pagination** includes **totalPages**, **hasNext**, **hasPrevious**. Create/patch room, create reservation, check-in/out, folio, and post-charge responses use nested DTOs in **ApiDtos** (e.g. folio **guest** is `{ id, name, email }`, not a flat **guestName**).

No real secrets in this file.

request.description: Requires X-Setup-Token (or ?setupToken=) matching hms.setup.token. If your Postman Environment defines `setupToken` as empty, it overrides the collection — delete it or fill it. A pre-request script fills the header when setupToken is blank (local dev default).

item.name: 02 — Auth
item.description: Run **01 Login super admin** before **03 — Platform Admin**. Run **02 Login hotel admin** before **04–12**. Each login overwrites **`token`** and **`refreshToken`** (v2.3). **03 Refresh** issues a new access + refresh pair.

item.name: 01 Login super admin (admin) — platform & SUPER_ADMIN APIs

request.description: **Super admin** — matches Initialize `superAdmin`: **`admin`** / **`ChangeMe!Strong1`**. Saves **`token`** + **`refreshToken`**. Optional: add `"email":"you@example.com"` if you set **email** on the user (v2.3 login-by-email).

item.name: 02 Login hotel admin (hoteladmin) — tenant / hotel APIs

request.description: **Hotel admin** — matches Initialize `hotelAdmin`: **`hoteladmin`** / **`ChangeMe!Strong2`**. Saves **`token`** + **`refreshToken`**. Use **`token`** for `/api/v1/hotels/{{hotelId}}/**` (folders **04–12**). Do **not** use this token for **03** (super admin only).

**POST /api/v1/auth/refresh** — body `{ "refreshToken": "{{refreshToken}}" }`. Run after **01** or **02** login so **`refreshToken`** is set. Returns new **`accessToken`** + rotated **`refreshToken`**.

item.name: 03 — Platform Admin (super admin `admin` only)
item.description: **Requires JWT from 02 — Auth → 01 Login super admin (admin).** Every request sends `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` as **super admin** — not hoteladmin. Paths that use **`{{hotelId}}`** refer to the **Initialize** hotel (same as **02 → 02 hoteladmin**). **`03 Onboard tenant`** saves **`onboardedTenantHotelId`** (does not change **`hotelId`**). **`08 Create hotel`** saves **`extraHotelId`** only. **Impersonate** saves **impersonationToken** (see **05 List rooms…**). WebSocket: `?token=<jwt>&impersonateToken=<jwt>`.

request.description: `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}` must be from **02 → 01 Login super admin (admin)**.
Super admin **`admin`** JWT only.

Creates **Hotel** + **PlatformTenant** + **HOTEL_ADMIN** user. **Super admin (`admin`)** Bearer required. Pre-request sets a unique **hotel.code**. On **201**, Tests save **`onboardedTenantHotelId`** from `tenantId` — **`hotelId` is not changed** (still the Initialize hotel for **`hoteladmin`**). To call hotel APIs for this tenant, log in as that tenant’s admin (see request body **contact.adminEmail** / set password via your onboarding flow).

Call as **super admin (`admin`)** only (same Bearer as **03**). Returns short-lived **HOTEL_ADMIN** JWT for **hotelId**. Use **impersonationToken** as `Authorization: Bearer` alone, or keep **admin** Bearer and add **X-Impersonate-Token: {{impersonationToken}}**.
Run **04 Impersonate** first so **impersonationToken** is set. **Main Bearer** = super admin **`admin`** `{{token}}`; header **X-Impersonate-Token** = impersonation JWT. **X-Hotel-ID** = **hotelId**.
Super admin **`admin`** JWT only.
Super admin **`admin`** JWT only.

**Endpoint:** `POST {{baseUrl}}/api/v1/platform/hotels`. Same **super admin `admin`** Bearer as requests **01–07**. On **201**, Tests save **`extraHotelId`** only — **`hotelId` stays the Initialize hotel** so **02 → 02 hoteladmin** + **`X-Hotel-ID: {{hotelId}}`** in **04–12** still work. To work on the new property, create/link a hotel user for **`{{extraHotelId}}`** and log in as that user (or impersonate that tenant). Change **code** in the body if **409** conflict.

item.name: 04 — Room types
item.description: Use **02 — Auth → 02 Login hotel admin (hoteladmin)** so `{{token}}` is a hotel-scoped user (and **X-Hotel-ID** matches **hotelId** from Initialize).

request.description: On 200, Tests set **roomTypeId** from the first room type (for Create room). Each element is **RoomTypeSummary** (**id**, **name**, **baseRate**, **maxOccupancy**, **bedCount**). Empty array means this hotel has no types yet — use **Create room type** first.
On 201, Tests save returned **id** into **roomTypeId** for Create room.

item.name: 05 — Rooms
item.description:
Hotel admin token from **02 → 02** + **X-Hotel-ID: {{hotelId}}**.

**Responses (v2.3-aligned):** **List rooms** returns **PagedData** with **pagination.totalPages**, **hasNext**, **hasPrevious**; each row includes **lastUpdated**, **building**, and expanded **roomType** / **currentReservation**. **Create room** returns **roomType**, **amenities**, **createdAt**, **createdBy**. **Patch room** returns **previousValues**, **updatedValues**, **broadcast**.

exec: pm.test('Room list item nested fields', function () {

request.description: **PagedData:** **data** + **pagination** with **totalPages**, **hasNext**, **hasPrevious**. Each **RoomListItem** includes **lastUpdated**, **building**, **RoomTypeSummary** (**maxOccupancy**, **bedCount**), and optional **currentReservation** (**guestId**, **status**, **checkOutDate**).

Returns **RoomDetailResponse**: **lastUpdated**, **maintenanceNotes**, **amenitiesOverride**, **currentReservation** (with **guestId**, **status**, **checkOutDate**), **RoomTypeSummary** (**maxOccupancy**, **bedCount**). Uses **roomId** in the path.

Send **roomTypeId** (UUID from room-types) and/or **roomTypeCode** (e.g. STD, DLX) for this hotel. If `roomTypeId` is unset, the pre-request script drops it and defaults **roomTypeCode** to STD — create a type with that code first, or change the code in the body to match your hotel.

**201 body:** **CreateRoomResponse** — **roomType**, **floor**, **building**, **cleanliness**, **amenities**, **createdAt**, **createdBy**, **message**.
**PatchRoomResponse:** **previousValues** / **updatedValues** (**RoomLifecycleSnapshot**), **broadcast** (**event**, **channel**, **payload**).
Soft-deletes the room (`deleted=true`). **409** if the room has CONFIRMED or CHECKED_IN reservations.

item.name: 06 — Reservations
item.description:
**Availability** is public (no Bearer). Other calls: **02 → 02** hotel admin + **X-Hotel-ID**.

**Responses:** **Create reservation** — **guest**, **stay**, **pricing**, **cancellation**, **nextSteps**; root **guestId** still saved to variables. **Check-in** — **guest**, **folio**, **broadcast**, **room.cleanliness**. **Folio** — **guest**, **stay**, **payments**, **summary** (incl. **currency**), **actions**, **realtime**. **Post charge** — **roomNumber**, **folio**, **postedBy**. **Check-out** — **invoiceBreakdown**, optional **feedback** / **postCheckout**.

request.description: Send **roomTypeId** and/or **roomTypeCode** for this hotel. Pre-request: clears empty roomTypeId, defaults **roomTypeCode** STD, and sets **checkInDate**/**checkOutDate** to rolling windows (check-in +21 days, 3-night stay) so repeated runs avoid “No rooms available” from old overlapping bookings. On 201, Tests save **reservationId**, **roomId**, and **guestId** (root **guestId** or **guest.id**). Response includes **guest**, **stay**, **pricing**, **cancellation**, **nextSteps**.

Reservation must be **CONFIRMED**. Run after **Create reservation** and before **Check-in**. Merges `overrides` into the guest’s stored `preferencesJson` for this call (e.g. `room.preferredFloor`). If a better **AVAILABLE** room exists for the same room type and dates, the reservation room may be reassigned.
**CONFIRMED** → CANCELLED; room returns **AVAILABLE**. Idempotent if already cancelled. **409** if CHECKED_IN / CHECKED_OUT.

CONFIRMED → CHECKED_IN. Run after **Create reservation** (so `reservationId` is set). Required before **Post room charge**.

**200 body:** **CheckInResponse** — **guest** (**idVerified**, …), **folio** (**folioRef**, **viewPathTemplate**, **openingBalancePreTax**), **broadcast**, **room.cleanliness**, **digitalKey**, **nextSteps**. **payment** is present only if the request includes **paymentMethod**.

exec: throw new Error('reservationId is empty. Run **Create reservation** (201) then **Check-in**; Create reservation Tests save reservationId and overwrite roomId with the booked room. URL roomId must match that reservation after check-in.');

request.description:
POST body must include **reservationId** (pre-request injects it from the variable). Reservation must be **CHECKED_IN** and **roomId** in the URL must be the reservation's assigned room (set by **Create reservation** Tests). If you only used **Create room**, run **Create reservation** + **Check-in** first or paste a checked-in reservation UUID.

**201:** **PostChargeResponse** — **roomNumber**, **quantity**, **type**, **postedBy**, **folio** (**previousTotalPreTax**, **newBalancePreTax**), **inventoryImpact** (often null).

**FolioResponse:** **guest** (object), **stay**, **roomNumber**, **roomTypeName**, **charges** (each with **quantity**, **postedBy**, **reversible**, **productSku**), **payments** (e.g. synthetic **DEPOSIT** when applicable), **summary** (**subtotal**, **taxes**, **currency**, …), **actions**, **realtime**.

**CheckOutResponse** includes **invoice** (lines + totals), **invoiceBreakdown** (**roomCharges**, **consumptionCharges**, **subtotalBeforeTax**, **taxes**, **depositCredit**, **grandTotal**), optional **feedback** / **postCheckout** when sent in the body, and **room.cleanliness**.
Returns room cleaning tasks plus **minibarRestockTasks** (OPEN minibar restock rows) after checkout-driven restock logic.

item.name: 08 — Guests (Module 6)
item.description: **02 → 02** hotel admin + **X-Hotel-ID** (loyalty endpoints may require manager role per backend).
Uses **guestId** saved by **Create reservation** (201). Update **guest** row `preferences_json` in the DB if you need richer profile/preferences than inline guest creation.

request.description: Requires **HOTEL_ADMIN** (or MANAGER). Run **Login as hotel admin** first. Saves **facilityId** on 201.
Pre-request sets **startTime**/**endTime** to tomorrow 10:00–11:00 local. Needs **facilityId**. Saves **facilitySlotId** on 201.

exec: throw new Error('facilitySlotId missing. Run Create facility slot (201) first.');

item.name: Create facility booking (charge to room folio)

exec: throw new Error('facilitySlotId missing. Run Create facility slot first.');
throw new Error('reservationId missing. Run Reservations → Create reservation + Check-in first.');

request.description: Requires **CHECKED_IN** reservation. Uses **facilitySlotId** and **reservationId**; posts RECREATION room charge when basePrice > 0 (set facility basePrice or use free pool with charge-to-room false for walk-through).
Uses **facilityBookingId** and **facilityAccessCode** from Create facility booking.

item.name: Facility charge to room (if not charged at booking)

request.description: For bookings without **chargeToRoom** at creation, with an active CHECKED_IN reservation linked. **02 → 02 hoteladmin** is allowed (same as reception/finance).

exec: throw new Error('inventoryCategoryId missing. Run Create inventory category first.');

request.description: If **reservationId** is set and guest is CHECKED_IN, pre-request adds **reference** for folio charge. Otherwise consumption only.

exec: throw new Error('supplierId missing. Run Create supplier first.');
throw new Error('inventoryItemId missing. Run Create inventory item first.');
body.lines = [{ itemId: String(iid).trim(), quantity: 10, unitPrice: 1.1, notes: 'Restock' }];
throw new Error('purchaseOrderId missing. Run Create purchase order first.');
throw new Error('poLineId missing. Run Create purchase order first.');

request.description: Path **itemId** must match the SKU on every **receivedLines** entry (single-item PO). Uses **purchaseOrderId** and **poLineId** from Create PO.

item.name: 11 — F&B (Module 7)
item.description:
**02 → 02** hotel admin + **X-Hotel-ID**.

**Run order:** **List F&B outlets** (optional) → **Create F&B outlet** (saves **fbOutletId**) → **Create menu item** (saves **menuItemId**) → **06 — Reservations** **Check-in** (needs **reservationId**) → **Create F&B order** (saves **fbOrderId**). Pre-request scripts inject real UUIDs so **outletId** / **menuItemId** are never null. You can still paste UUIDs into collection variables manually.

request.description: **GET** `/fb/outlets` — returns **FbOutletListItem** rows (**id**, **name**, **code**, **outletType**, **allowsRoomCharge**).
**POST** `/fb/outlets` — creates an outlet with **allowsRoomCharge** true (room orders). Pre-request sets a unique **code** each run. On **201**, saves **fbOutletId**.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman F&B Outlet",
  "code": "PLACEHOLDER",
  "outletType": "ROOM_SERVICE",
  "description": "Seeded from Postman",
  "allowsRoomCharge": true,
  "acceptsReservations": true
}

exec: throw new Error('fbOutletId is empty. Run **Create F&B outlet** first (201).');

request.description: **POST** `/fb/outlets/{fbOutletId}/menu-items`. Requires **fbOutletId** from **Create F&B outlet**. Pre-request sets a unique item **code**. On **201**, saves **menuItemId**.
Requires **fbOutletId**. Returns grouped menu (same contract as before).

exec: throw new Error('fbOutletId missing. Run **Create F&B outlet** first.');
throw new Error('menuItemId missing. Run **Create menu item** first.');
throw new Error('reservationId missing. Run **06 — Create reservation** then **Check-in**.');

request.description: **POST** `/fb/orders`. Pre-request copies **fbOutletId**, **menuItemId**, and **reservationId** into the JSON as real UUID strings (avoids **VALIDATION_FAILED** when variables were empty). Guest must be **CHECKED_IN** and outlet **allowsRoomCharge**. On **201**, saves **fbOrderId**.
Use when the order was created without **ROOM_CHARGE**; charges **order.total** to folio. Reservation must be **CHECKED_IN**.

item.name: 12 — Reports (Module 9)
item.description: Adjust **reportStartDate** / **reportEndDate** collection variables for your window. Nightly job (02:00 UTC) writes **daily_revenue_snapshots** from invoices.
